data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices on interface providing a seamless user experience.
data.technical_spec: User interfaces are designed with minimalistic menus to reduce decision time.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes button and input element sizes based on target distance to improve accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Adjusts elements appropriately based on device, ensuring ease of navigation.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design utilizes familiar patterns to ease cognitive load on users.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates standard navigation and action buttons found across popular communication apps.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Well-designed, visually appealing interfaces perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Clean, uncluttered design with consistent visual themes and color schemes.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits the amount of information presented at once to improve user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Messages and notifications are batch-delivered and grouped contextually.
